info.name: AM Gateway (WebSocket)
info.description:
API & WebSocket collection for am-gateway service.

The Gateway is a dumb relay — it handles WebSocket subscriptions and heartbeats only. All REST requests pass through Traefik to backend services.

Select an environment from the Environment dropdown:
- **Local**: Direct local service on port 8080
- **Dev**: dev.am.asrax.in
- **Preprod**: am.asrax.in
- **Prod**: am.munish.org

request.description: Spring Actuator health endpoint. Returns UP/DOWN status.
Open the Swagger UI for the Gateway service.

item.name: WebSocket (STOMP)
item.description:
The Gateway uses STOMP over WebSocket. These are NOT traditional HTTP requests — use Postman's WebSocket request type or a STOMP client.

WebSocket endpoint: {{ws_url}}/ws-gateway-raw

After connecting, send STOMP frames to the following destinations.

request.description:
WebSocket upgrade endpoint.

After connecting, send a STOMP SEND frame:

Destination: /app/portfolio/subscribe
Body: {"userId": "{{user_id}}", "portfolioId": "{{portfolio_id}}"}

Subscribe to updates on: /user/queue/portfolio/dashboard
